name: ACI 440.2R-17
title: Guide for the Design and Construction of Externally Bonded FRP Systems for Strengthening Concrete Structures
whatItIs: Primary U.S. design reference for FRP on concrete, issued by the American Concrete Institute, Committee 440.

name: ACI 440 family
title: FRP-related suite
whatItIs: Covers FRP bars, prestressing, and durability; the broader technical reference set behind FRP for concrete.

name: ASCE 41-23
title: Seismic Evaluation and Retrofit of Existing Buildings
whatItIs: Performance-based standard classifying deficiencies and targeting retrofit performance levels.

name: ATC-40
title: Seismic Evaluation and Retrofit of Concrete Buildings
whatItIs: Applied Technology Council methodology developed under the California Seismic Safety Commission; performance-based focus on concrete buildings.

name: CBC Chapter 16A
title: California Building Code, Title 24 Part 2
whatItIs: Structural design framework including seismic retrofit; retrofits permitted to follow ASCE 41.

name: CEBC Appendix A
title: California Existing Building Code, Appendix A
whatItIs: Guidelines for the seismic retrofit of existing buildings across building types.

name: ASTM (FRP-related)
title: Various ASTM test methods
whatItIs: Cover tensile, bond, environmental durability, and short-beam shear for the laminate and substrate interface.

name: ICC-ES ESR-2103
title: ICC Evaluation Service Report
whatItIs: LOCTITE Tyfo system for concrete and masonry strengthening; documents tested properties, design assumptions, and conditions of use.
